item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly arbitrates between the long-term AI trend and the immediate irreversible organizational action: it accepts that AI will absorb much QA work, but blocks dissolving QA now. It downgrades the action to role restructuring, AI-assisted QA adoption, measured replacement-rate targets over 1-2 quarters, and later downsizing based on quality metrics. This gives conditions and gates rather than simply agreeing or opposing, with no method stacking."}
